untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of mean reversion vs trending behavior and identification of 'reference price' with context-dependent entry logic. Specific lookback_period, threshold, half_life, and backtest parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT are undefined. Mean reversion detection requires statistical regime identification not directly available in allowed indicators. Pivot point used as proxy for 'reference price' but this is an approximation.
translation_notes: Translated trending detection using ADX_14 > 25 as trend strength indicator. Used SMA_50 as reference price proxy for relative positioning (high/low). Used pivot point as secondary reference level. Entry conditions assume: LONG when trending up and price above reference, SHORT when trending down and price below reference. Exit conditions are reversal of entry trend. This is a simplified interpretation given the lack of explicit mean reversion indicators and author-silent parameters. A production implementation would require specification of lookback_period and reversion detection method.
